assumptionLines: Weight memory is calculated as ceil(parameters * bits_per_weight / 8).
KV cache memory assumes 1 parallel sequence (no batch inference).
KV cache uses 2 * layers * kv_heads * head_dim * context * bytes_per_element.
Quantized KV cache (q8_0, q4_0) use idealized byte estimates; actual implementation may differ.
Runtime fixed overhead is a constant GiB value based on the selected profile.
Compute buffer is the greater of a minimum GiB value or a fraction of weight memory.
Safety margin is the greater of a minimum GiB value or a fraction of the subtotal.
The caller-selected headroom percent is applied separately outside this estimate.
All memory values are estimates and may differ from actual runtime usage.
